message:
Implement js_std_loop_no_poll for WASI event loop

- Add non-blocking event loop that runs timers without blocking poll()
- With piped stdin, jobs run (34k+ in 60s) but API call not reached
- Without piped stdin, job #8 hangs (blocked on stdin read)
- Sentry warning appears, indicating SDK initialization progresses
- Fetch polyfill is installed but never called

Key insight: The SDK initialization has an infinite job loop,
likely from async operations that keep re-scheduling.
Need to investigate why the actual API call is never made.
